title: D2 content-at-scale proxy ($0 / LLM-free at measure)

eval/s15b_d2_proxy.py runner + pure stats; --smoke green end-to-end; runs/0.8.3-s15b-smoke.json

red_green: RED captured with module moved aside (ModuleNotFoundError: eval.s15b_d2_proxy); GREEN = 21 passed

pinned_decisions_honored.criterion_1: paired enriched−placebo per-query recall margin; fixed-seed percentile bootstrap CI; gate margin_ci_lo>0; paired MDE emitted
pinned_decisions_honored.criterion_2: pre-registered b_hi=0.75/b_lo=0.00 (no argmax); penalty_present := (plain−placebo)@b_hi CI_lo>0; neutralized := (plain−placebo)@b_lo CI ⊂ [−δ_d2,+δ_d2] TOST; underpowered (mde>δ_d2 and not contained) ⇒ inconclusive; b=0.25 reported as B_SECONDARY non-gating
pinned_decisions_honored.removes_rule: (NOT penalty_present) OR (penalty_present AND neutralized); underpowered neutralization ⇒ removes_status='inconclusive' (never silent True)
pinned_decisions_honored.three_way_verdict: PASS (probe True) / FAIL-at-power (probe False AND margin MDE ≤ δ_d2) / INCONCLUSIVE (margin MDE > δ_d2 OR neutralization underpowered); INCONCLUSIVE overrides FAIL
pinned_decisions_honored.key_set_placebo_invariant: placebo length-matched to FULL enriched addition (entities + fact triples); foreign-only pool excludes the doc's OWN key tokens of EVERY type; RED test test_b_placebo_matches_full_key_set_every_type pins it (no alias/temporal keys added beyond r6 entities+relations)
pinned_decisions_honored.llm_free_at_measure: runner never calls an LLM/reader; consumes a pre-built extractions.json; no priced-reader fallback path exists (fail-closed: missing --graphs ⇒ json load raises)

hard_subset_key_set_used.key_set: entities + relations/facts (r6 native; no alias/temporal added)
hard_subset_key_set_used.corpus_full: power-sized LME re-pinned gold (Slice-5; provisional per-class N≥150, pooled ≥600 — orchestrator confirms from the Slice-5 manifest)

smoke_verdict.note: toy wiring fixture where the queried entity token is enrichment-only; PASS is expected and is NOT a measurement — it only proves end-to-end wiring + the gate path

full_notes: --full uses backend=fts (FathomDB-FTS arms for criterion 1) — requires the native extension; run from the main tree / a tree where fathomdb._fathomdb imports (the worktree src/python shadows the installed editable ext, so --full cannot run here).
--per-class is the Slice-5 power-sized number; 150 is the design provisional (pooled ≥600) — confirm/override from the Slice-5 re-pin manifest before spending.

Cached extractions live at the MAIN repo data/corpus-data/graph-cache/0.8.2-m1-v1/extractions.json (gitignored EVAL-ONLY; absent in this worktree). LME sessions missing a cached graph are no-op-enriched; if the orchestrator extracts fresh LME keys, that GPU pass is the OFFLINE-BUILD step (local Qwen, <5% GPU, after sibling coordination) — pass the pinned endpoint/model via --lme-endpoint/--lme-model for provenance (recorded in output.extraction).
Criterion-2 legs ALWAYS use tunable-b BM25 (FathomDB-FTS has a fixed b); this is unchanged between --smoke and --full.
